pergunta: quais são os 3 clientes que mais compraram esse mês?
sql: SELECT PCCLIENT.CLIENTE, SUM(PCPEDC.VLTOTAL) AS total_comprado FROM PCPEDC INNER JOIN PCCLIENT ON PCPEDC.CODCLI = PCCLIENT.CODCLI WHERE PCPEDC.POSICAO = 'F' AND STRFTIME('%m', PCPEDC.DATA) = STRFTIME('%m', CURRENT_DATE) AND STRFTIME('%Y', PCPEDC.DATA) = STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY PCCLIENT.CLIENTE ORDER BY total_comprado DESC LIMIT 3;
